Happy
Birthday,
Mom.

July 14th · A day as beautiful as you

To the woman who has always shown up, always believed in us, and always made every moment feel like it mattered — today is yours. Every flower, every wish, every word on this page was put here by someone whose life is better because you're in it.

We love you endlessly ♡
